text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back after a day out with El Condor
Pasa...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, this is kinda random, but do you know much
about flowers?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Like, flower names and what they mean?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well... I broke one of Grass's flower vases the
other day...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ah, it wasn't on purpose or anything!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I was just practicin' some wrestling moves in our
room and I accidentally kicked it.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I apologized right away, of course, and she pretty
much forgave me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But it was super important to her, so I feel really
bad about it...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I wanna get her a vase and some flowers as a
proper apology.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's go first thing tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Thanks a ton, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop by the library afterward to look into flower
meanings before heading back to my place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, we go to the flower shop first thing
in the morning.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass knows a ton about flowers, so we gotta
pick something hella good!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I know a little bit about flowers, but when it
comes to giving them to someone...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Do you know what flower would be best to give
Grass in this situation?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Do you know what flower would be best to give
Grass in this situation?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, they make tea out of chamomile, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to El Condor Pasa that flowers have
different meanings depending on the region, but
chamomiles often mean "reconciliation."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I further explain that they can also mean
"strength" and "fortitude."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I see... Then let's go with a vase and some tea!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Fortitude... That's just like Grass! Perfect for my
rival!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But, hmmm... Do you think it might come off as a
challenge?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa laughs mischievously as we buy
some chamomile leaves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we give them to Grass Wonder later, she
accepts them with a smile and warns El Condor
Pasa not to let her guard down.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Those ones are small and cute, right? Just like
Grass!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So, what do they mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I read that baby's breath means "appreciation."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like a perfect fit for Grass Wonder, who
has been a very helpful roommate to El Condor
Pasa.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I see... That sounds perfect! I'm hella grateful for
Grass!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Baby's breath it is! Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa gives Grass Wonder pink and
white baby's breath later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, Grass Wonder laughed and
mentioned that the meaning of flowers changes
depending on the color.
